tool_args.label: Battery Place Bus Priority
tool_args.raw_text: Battery Place Bus Priority. Battery Pl identified as priority project due to: Slow bus speeds & unreliable bus travel times, High volume of buses, Long travel time for passengers. Study recommendations: Improved TEA placement and instruction - Completed; Updated curb regulations on West St to keep curb lane clear - Completed; Stop consolidation on Broadway, Battery Pl; Queue jump signal on Battery Pl @ Broadway - Completed.

payload.description: Battery Place identified as priority project due to slow bus speeds, unreliable bus travel times, high volume of buses, and long travel time for passengers. Part of Better Buses Action Plan 24 priority projects for 2019.

tool_args.label: Better Buses Action Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Mayor's 2019 State of the City. Improve bus speeds 25% by 2020. Better Buses Action Plan released April 2019. 24 priority projects announced for 2019 to increase bus speeds across all 5 boroughs.

payload.description: Mayor's 2019 State of the City initiative to improve bus speeds 25% by 2020. Better Buses Action Plan released April 2019. 24 priority projects announced for 2019 to increase bus speeds across all 5 boroughs.

tool_args.label: Battery Pl
tool_args.raw_text: Battery Place Bus Priority. Battery Pl identified as priority project due to: Slow bus speeds & unreliable bus travel times, High volume of buses, Long travel time for passengers.

payload.description: Battery Place corridor in Lower Manhattan, identified as a priority project for bus priority improvements. Corridor experiences slow bus speeds, unreliable travel times, high volume of buses, and long travel times for passengers.

tool_args.label: Issues identified at Battery Pl
tool_args.raw_text: Issues Identified: Priority given to Battery Park Underpass at BBT approach; Battery Pl delay affects 15 Express bus routes; 4-7 pm peak period sees 190 trips serving over 5,500 daily customers; Traffic delays accessing West Street; Poor curb management/enforcement; Ped safety/comfort at crosswalk
